## Type of Change

## Checklist

<!-- Mark the items that apply with an "x" like so: [x] -->

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have run `cargo clippy --all-targets`, `cargo fmt --check`, and `cargo test` locally and all pass.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for my changes.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if my changes affect the public API or CLI usage.
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions (see [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)).
- [ ] No production code uses `unsafe` or panics.
